summary: Backend 20/20 pytest passed. Frontend loads, all 8 collection routes render correct products (Millets=8, Spices=6, Rices=4, Oils=5, Dals=4, Cookies=4, Processed=4, best-sellers=35). PATH_TO_CATEGORY mapping correct. Add-to-cart works (toast + header count updated). Sort & filters work. Static pages /about /social /contact load 200.

ui_bugs.issue: No data-testid on cart icon button; could not open cart drawer via testid

action_items: Add data-testid="header-cart-btn" to cart icon button in Header for easier e2e
Consider: /collections/best-sellers shows ALL 35 products (no 'best-seller' badge filter applied) — verify if intended
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses datetime.utcnow() (deprecated in py3.12) - use datetime.now(timezone.utc)
CORS allow_origins=['*'] with allow_credentials=True is invalid per CORS spec
DB count is 35 products not 28 — seed_data.py has more items than PRD states (not a bug, just FYI)
seed_data_creation: Cart sessions prefixed TEST_ created and cleared in tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core flows verified end-to-end against public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Cart drawer open via testid not verified — main agent should add data-testid to header cart button.
